evals.prompt: I want to build a WhatsApp chatbot that qualifies leads by asking about their company size and budget, then books a demo for qualified leads or sends a resource guide for unqualified ones. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Guide covering WhatsApp Business API connection, qualification flow design with branching based on company size/budget answers, meeting booking for qualified leads, content delivery for unqualified, and 24-hour window considerations

assertions.name: whatsapp_rules
assertions.description: Must mention the 24-hour messaging window and template message requirements for messaging outside the window

assertions.name: qualification_flow
assertions.description: Must describe a branching flow that asks qualification questions and routes to different outcomes based on answers

assertions.name: handoff_or_booking
assertions.description: Must explain how to connect qualified leads to a demo booking or human handoff, and how to deliver content to unqualified leads

evals.prompt: We get hundreds of support questions on our website and Facebook page. I want a bot that handles FAQs automatically and transfers to a human when it can't answer. What's the best approach?
evals.expected_output: Strategy for building a multi-channel FAQ bot with structured menus, fallback handling, and human handoff configuration across website widget and Facebook Messenger

assertions.name: faq_structure
assertions.description: Must recommend organizing FAQs into categories/menus with button-based navigation rather than free-text matching

assertions.name: fallback_escalation
assertions.description: Must describe fallback behavior when the bot can't answer and automatic escalation to human agents

assertions.name: multi_channel
assertions.description: Must address deploying the same bot logic across both website live chat and Facebook Messenger

evals.prompt: I'm using SendPulse and want to connect my Telegram bot to my email marketing so that when someone completes the bot flow, they get added to an email sequence. How do I wire this up?
evals.expected_output: Technical guide for connecting SendPulse chatbot flows to Automation 360 email sequences using actions, tags, or API triggers

assertions.name: sendpulse_chatbot
assertions.description: Must reference SendPulse's chatbot flow builder and how to add action steps that subscribe contacts to mailing lists or set tags

assertions.name: automation_connection
assertions.description: Must explain how to trigger an Automation 360 email sequence from a chatbot event (via mailing list subscription, tag, or webhook)

assertions.name: data_flow
assertions.description: Must describe how contact data (name, email collected in bot) flows from the chatbot to the email system for personalization
